Enabled.Description: Whether any of these Pokemon are added.

Show In Catalogue.Description: Whether Pokemon are in the catalogue.

In Shop.Description: Whether Pokemon are in Robins Shop.

Non-shiny.Description: Whether any non-shiny Pokemon are available. You do not have to uncheck any of the individual non-shiny options below if you uncheck this one.

Shiny.Description: Whether any shiny Pokemon are available. You do not have to uncheck any of the individual shiny options below if you uncheck this one.
